description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Content Update (Published: June 25, 2026)

The Sugo-Ashi Walking Event scheduled for Saturday, June 27, 2026—"Walk from Musashidai and Yokotedai to Azuma Gorge"—has been cancelled due to expected poor weather.

Original plan:
• Date: Saturday, June 27
• Meeting time: 10:00 a.m.
• Meeting place: West parking lot of Hanno City Hall
• Course distance: approximately 13 kilometers (City Hall → Nakai → mountain path alongside Musashigaoka Golf Club → Tourist Information Office → beside Musashidai water tank → Yokotedai → beside Manfukuji temple → Azuma Gorge → Hanno Riverbed → City Hall)
• Planned duration: approximately 4 hours
• Fee: 200 yen (insurance etc., collected on the day)

We apologize for any inconvenience.

Inquiries: Onda 090-2205-8073 / Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/9290.html
summary: ℹ️ 【CANCELLED】Sugo-Ashi Walking Event, Saturday, June 27, 2026: Walk from Musashidai and Yokotedai to Azuma Gorge
